ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Forrest Gump'}),
    p2 = (actor)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(movie2:Movie {title: 'Saving Private Ryan'}),
    p3 = (movie1)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(review:Review {summary: 'A classic'})-[r4:REVIEWED]->(actor)-[r5:FOLLOWS]->(actor2:Person {name: 'DiCaprio'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the influence of Tom Hanks’s roles and directorial work on *Forrest Gump* and *Saving Private Ryan* shape his reputation among critics who also follow Leonardo DiCaprio?

cypher:
MATCH (tom:Person {name: "Tom Hanks"})-[:ACTED_IN]->(forrest:Movie {title: "Forrest Gump"}),       (tom)-[:DIRECTED]->(forrest),       (tom)-[:ACTED_IN]->(ryan:Movie {title: "Saving Private Ryan"})
WHERE (tom)-[:DIRECTED]->(ryan)
MATCH (tom)-[:FOLLOWS]->(critic:Person {name: "Leonardo DiCaprio"})
MATCH (critic)-[:REVIEWED]->(forrest),       (critic)-[:REVIEWED]->(ryan)
RETURN 
    (tom)-[:ACTED_IN]->(forrest)-[:REVIEWED]->(review1:Node {summary: "Forrest Gump Review"}),       (tom)-[:ACTED_IN]->(ryan)-[:REVIEWED]->(review2:Node {summary: "Saving Private Ryan Review"}),       (critic)-[:REVIEWED]->(review1),       (critic)-[:REVIEWED]->(review2)
